extraction.one_line_summary: ROGLIC Primoz won sprint finish after late crash decimated field, beating EVENPOEL Remco by centimeters after barriers blocked Remco's late surge
tactical_patterns: Break captured inside final 6km suggests teams miscalculated pursuit timing given circuit's late ramps.
Final corners created positioning chaos; Evenepoel blocked by barriers despite being fastest finisher reveals sprint setup vulnerability.

rider_signals.EVENPOEL Remco: positive: fastest finisher but tactically trapped by corners and barriers, suggests pure speed superior to Roglic
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: positioned perfectly through technical finale while Evenepoel fumbled, clinical race craft
rider_signals.HAYTER Ethan: neutral: in contention for sprint finish on hilly circuit, broader stage range than typically shown
